authority: repository-local skill, documentation, policy, test, Git commit, main push, and remote-ref readback only; no provider, workflow, deployment, credential, release, or production mutation

check:skills passed 167 files and 16 mirrors; check:docs passed 206 files; 42 tooling tests reject missing PRD/ordinary routes, runbooks, proof/lifecycle, metadata/mirror, portability, background controls, provider actuality, and tool-authority separation.

Effect setup, boundaries, docs/skills, 42 tooling tests, Ultracite, lint, Knip, five typechecks, and 250 package/app tests passed with schema-valid synthetic Executor test configuration and no provider call.

postcondition: Bundjil has a clean-clone-portable docs-maintainer route for PRD and ordinary work, structured semantic enforcement, report-only background behavior, and addressable forward evidence; HGI-303 may create app-owned runbooks on this baseline.
